titleStmt.title: SII 24.263: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 263. (A.R. No. 318 of 1952-53.) TIRUKKUṞAḶAPPAN (VĀMANA) SHRINE, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Commences with the introduction Samasta bhuvanāśraya etc. Registers a gift of land in Nāraṇamaṅgalam alias Chembiyaṉ-Ṉeṟkuppai in Uṟaiyūr-kūṟṟam yielding about 300 and odd kalam of paddy and other grain, as sarvanamasya (tax-free) to the Brāhmaṇas of Kāliṅgarāya-chaturvēdimaṅgalam by Śīvanindākālan alias Kāliṅgarāyan of Cheḻuvāttūr in Kāḍāvūr in Tirukkāṉappērk-kūṟṟam with certain stipulations (details lost). Among the taxes that are exempted on the gift land may be mentioned vaikkōl, āyattuṇḍam etc.
The date portion of the record is badly damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja parameśvara dvāravati puravarādhīśvara yādavakulāmbaradyumaṇi sarvvajñacūḍāmaṇi mallarājarāja malaparoḷugaṇḍa gaṇḍa[bheruṇḍa kadanapra]caṇḍa ṅgavīra
śanivārasiddhi giridurgamalla caladaṅkarāma vairibhakaṇṭhirava makararājyanirmmūlana pāṇḍyakulasamuddharaṇa coḷarājyapratiṣṭhācāryyasvīkāra pārijātakanaka dhārā parivārasannāha niśśaṅkapratāpacakravartti deva śrīraṅga
ttut teṟkil tirumañcaṉattuṟaimukattukku meṟkup pāṇṭi maṇṭalattut tiruk kāṉappeṟ kūṟṟattuk kāṭāvūrc ceḻuvattūruṭaiyāṉ Aracu civanintākālaṉāṉa kāliṅkarāyar Ukantaruḷappaṇṇat tiruvāra ṉār śrī vāmana nāyaṉār
koyilaic cūḻa Ivareṟṟiṉa koyilakaram śrīkāliṅkarāya[ ccaturvedimaṅka] lattup paṭṭarkaḷukku taṅkaḷukkuk kāṇiyāka Ivar peril kuṭut nattaṅkaḷ rāja rāja vaḷanāṭṭu vaṭavaḻi nāṭṭut tiruveḷḷaṟai mūlapari[ṣa] ṇṭa Ivvūr piṭākai
karumāṇikkanallūrukkicainta kiḻpāṟkellai koyilakaram śrīlakṣmīnarasiṅhacatu rvvedimaṅkalattu piṭākai tiruppeṟceri Ellaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai kāveri niroṭukālukku (vaṭakku) vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai coḻa nallūr Ellaik
ku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai � kuṭiyum ciṟā teṟ cainta nilam ṇik kiḻarai
lavari Oru tte nālumā ntirikaik kiḻarai māvum varaku muppattaiṅkala varicai pacāṉa puṉpayiru kkāṇiyum payaṟu muppattaiṅkala varicai Akavāṟṟu
kku kiḻai Irumākāṇik kiḻaraiye Irumāmukkāṇi muntirikai kiḻarai yemuṉṟumā Itil Ivūr tirumeṟkoyilemperumāṉ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam Iṟai yili kārmaṟu nilam māvarai muntirikaiyum periyanāṭṭut tuṟkaiyāruṟai
nilam mākāṇiyum tiruveḷḷaṟai śrīnārāyaṇa nampiyār Iṟaiyili kārmaṟu nilam kāṇiyum Āka nilam nālu māmuntirikai nikkina kārmaṟunilam pattenālu māvaraikkāṇi raiye Irumāvaraiyum Oru pūnilam pattenālumā muk kāṇi
muntirikaik kiḻaraimāvum puṉ payir nilam Āṟe mukkāle Oru mā mukkāṇiyum Akavāṟṟu puṉpayir nilam Iraṇṭumāvum Āka nilam Irupattiraṇṭe mā mukkāṇi kiḻarai � vukku Oṭṭuppaṭi nellu nālāyirattirunūṟ ṟeṇpattaṟu
nāṟkalaṉe mukkuṟuṇi Aṟunāḻiyum payaṟu mukkalaṉe tūṇippatakkum Iṟaiyili mākka �l nellu Eḻukalane Eḻukuṟuṇi nāṉāḻi Āka lāyirattu muṉṉūṟṟuk kalaṉe Aiṅkuṟuṇi Eḻunāḻi Uriyum
A nāṟkalane mukkuṟuṇi nāḻiyum payaṟu mukkalaṉe tūṇip patakkum Uḷḷūr Iṟaiyili Uṭpaṭṭa nilattukku veṭṭi vaikkol kāttikaippaccai nāṭṭu viṉiyokam Atikārappeṟu Ati peṟu mākkaṭamai mati veṟṟilai kaṭaiyāyam ciṟṟāya
m taṟiyiṟai taṭṭārappāṭṭam kuḷa Uḷḷiṭṭa vaṟkaṅkaḷum cekkiṟaiyum Āyattuṇṭamum Ūr kaṇakkaṉ kācu kumārakāṇiThe continuation of this and the following lines are lost.
rājagambhīravaḷanāṭṭu Uṟaiyūr kūṟṟattu nāraṇamaṅkalamāṉa cempiyaṉ neṟ kuppai nāṉ kellaikkuḷpaṭṭuk kaṇakkil mutalāṉa kārmaṟuThe continuation of this and the following lines are lost.
lenālumā muntiri vil tirumeṟkoyilem perumāṉ tiruviḷaiyāṭṭa Iṟaiyili nikkiThe continuation of this and the following lines are lost.
ppattai nāṭṭu viniyokamum AtikāraThe rest is covered up by floor.
vaṟkaṅkaḷum cekkiṟai Āyattuṇṭam kup vaṟkam Uḷ ḷiṭṭa sarvvasiddhāyaṅkaḷum Uḷpaṭavum Āka Ira
sarvvanamasyayiṟaiyili Āka Eṟṟattāḻ ttom Iṉ ṉilaṅkaḷum ḷā nattaṅkaḷum nilaṅkaḷum bhāgāśrayaṅ
ppum ceṉṉalum ceṅkaḻu Uḷḷi koṇṭu taṅ kaḷile � yolaiyum Eḻuti Aṇubhavikkavum Aṉubha
Irupatiṉ kalanellāka Āṭa badly damaṅed
Digital edition of SII 24.263 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
